root.sql:
SELECT vr_nsk_015_007000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_007000.memname, vr_nsk_015_007000.seq_no, vr_nsk_015_007000.mem_type_desc, vr_nsk_015_007000.operate_date, vr_nsk_015_007000.item_type, vr_nsk_015_007000.period, vr_nsk_015_007000.share_value, vr_nsk_015_007000.share_stock, vr_nsk_015_007000.sign_flag , vr_nsk_015_007000.member_group_no FROM vr_nsk_015_007000 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_007000.operate_date between '!operate_date_1!' and '!operate_date_2!' and vr_nsk_015_007000.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and vr_nsk_015_007000.membership_no= sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
/*WHERE*/
